title: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security
full_text:
# [Attachment: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security.pdf] (3)
Azadi,
Arnritit Mahotsav
# INSURANCE REGULATORY AND ircleai DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA Ref No: IRDA/GA&HR/GDL/MISC/184/09/2022 2" Sep, 2022 To ### All Insurance Intermediaries ## Re: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security 1. Reference is drawn to Point no. 3 on “Applicability” of Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers dated 07.04.2017 read as “this guidelines document is applicable to all insurers regulated by Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI).” 2. It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect. ' Member (F&l)
a4 a. 115/1, wredttae fefeere, aRCTAST, ZzeTaTa-500 032, MA | Survey No. 115/4, Financial District, Nanakramguda, Hyderabad-500 032, India : +91-40-20204000 aaarze : www.irdai.gov.in ©) : +91-40-20204000 Website: www.irdai.gov.in # [Attachment: attachment-2] (3)
Azadi,
Arnritit Mahotsav
